10.sourceTitle: BBB Cycling CoreCap AL Valve BTI-166 Tubeless Valves - BIKE24
10.extractionRationale: Retail price for BBB Cycling CoreCap AL Valve (2 pieces) found directly in the product listing: 20,16 EUR. This is a single price point, so the median equals the extracted value.

27.sourceTitle: Schwalbe Clik Valve - Tubeless-Ventil - 2er Set - 80 mm | BIKE24
27.evidenceText: Distinct product URLs identified: p1859950.html (80mm), p1960182.html (tube), p1859949.html (60mm), p1859948.html (40mm). Source 2 is a category page, not a product listing.
27.extractionRationale: Counted unique product page URLs from the 5 sources. Excluded the category/filter page (Source 2) as it is not an individual product listing. Four distinct product URLs were identified: 80mm valve, 60mm valve, 40mm valve, and a Clik Valve tube product.

30.evidenceText: No stock status information found in any of the 4 product listings provided. All sources show only product descriptions without availability indicators.
30.extractionRationale: Stock status cannot be determined from the provided text excerpts. None of the 4 Schwalbe Clik Valve product pages (60mm, 40mm, 80mm tubeless valves, or conversion kit) contain visible stock status information such as 'out of stock', 'currently unavailable', 'nicht verfügbar', 'ausverkauft', or similar terms.

56.evidenceText: The provided sources mention Clik Valve as a filter/category option for tubes but do not provide an enumerated list of specific distinct inner tube models or SKUs using the Clik valve interface.
56.extractionRationale: While Source 3 indicates Clik Valve tubes exist as a filterable category, none of the provided sources contain a complete list of distinct inner tube models/SKUs with Clik valve specifications. Source 4 is a valve product, not a tube. Sources 1, 2, and 5 are marketing/informational pages without model counts or specific SKU listings.

61.sourceTitle: Aluminum - Price - Chart - Historical Data - News - Trading Economics
61.evidenceText: Aluminum is expected to trade at 3643.69 USD/Tonne by the end of this quarter
61.extractionRationale: The source directly states an aluminum price of 3643.69 USD/Tonne. This is already in the requested format (USD per metric ton), so no conversion was needed. The value is extracted directly from the quoted text.

62.sourceTitle: Aluminium Premium Duty paid US Midwest (LUPc1) - Investing.com
62.evidenceText: The Aluminium Premium Duty paid US Midwest price today is 1,793.99
62.extractionRationale: Extracted the price value of 1,793.99 from Investing.com source and converted from cents/lb to USD/lb by dividing by 100, resulting in 17.94 USD/lb for the US Midwest aluminum premium.
